characters.appearance: Anthropomorphic pineapple girl. Human-like face, large brown eyes, freckles, green leafy crown. Expressive features ranging from sad to joyful.
characters.wardrobe: Orange t-shirt and blue denim overalls.

characters.appearance: Anthropomorphic pomegranate. Round red body, wrinkled human-like face, greyish top texture.
Anthropomorphic strawberry child. Small red body, big eyes, green leafy top.
Anthropomorphic lemon woman. Yellow skin, red lips.
Anthropomorphic avocado man. Green skin, large belly.

scenes.supernova_script:
Character B says: Maya, batao, nayi job kaisi hai? [Maya, tell us, how is the new job?]
Character A says: Job? Um... good. But client... very angry on me. [Job? Um... good. But client... very angry on me.]
Character C says: It's 'angry with me', Didi. You don't know basic English? [It's 'angry with me', Didi. You don't know basic English?]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Establishes the core problem: the protagonist's lack of English confidence.
- Uses a relatable family setting where a younger relative corrects the older one, causing embarrassment.
- Hooks the target audience who might have faced similar workplace or social language struggles.
scenes.supernova_on_screen_text:
POV: WHEN ENGLISH HOLDS YOU BACK
maya. tell us.
MAYA BATAO NAYI
how is the new job?
JOB KAISI HAI?
job? um...
JOB? UM...
good. but client...
GOOD. BUT CLIENT...
very angry on me
VERY ANGRY ON ME
IT'S ANGRY WITH ME
BASIC ENGLISH?

scenes.supernova_script: Character A says: Oh. Mummy-Papa ne meri padhai ke liye itna kuch kiya. Aur main thodi si English ke bina aage nahi badh pa rahi. [Oh. Mom and Dad did so much for my education. And I can't move forward without a little English.]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Shows the emotional toll of the language barrier.
- Connects the struggle to family sacrifice, a strong cultural touchpoint for Indian learners.
- Builds empathy and sets up the motivation to improve.
scenes.supernova_on_screen_text:
MUMMY-PAPA DID
SO MUCH FOR
MY EDUCATION
AND I CAN'T
MOVE FORWARD
WITHOUT A LITTLE
ENGLISH

scenes.scene_summary:
- Demonstrates dedication and the convenience of mobile learning.
- Shows the passage of time and consistent effort.
- Transitions the mood from despair to determination.

scenes.supernova_script:
Character B says: Meri bachhi, tu aa gayi! [My child, you're here!]
Character A says: Dadi, I got the promotion! I handled the foreign clients perfectly today. [Grandma, I got the promotion! I handled the foreign clients perfectly today.]
Character B says: Maya, itni fluent English? [Maya, such fluent English?]
Character B says: Mujhe tujh par bahut garv hai, beta. [I am so proud of you, dear.]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Delivers the emotional payoff of the protagonist's hard work.
- Replaces the original Spanish connection with a career success milestone (promotion/client handling).
- Reinforces the supportive family dynamic.
scenes.supernova_on_screen_text:
my child. you're here
MERI BACHHI TU AA GAYI
grandma. i got the promotion
DADI I GOT THE PROMOTION
i handled the foreign clients
I HANDLED THE FOREIGN CLIENTS
perfectly today
PERFECTLY TODAY
maya. such fluent english?
MAYA ITNI FLUENT ENGLISH?
i am so proud
MUJHE TUJH PAR
of you. dear.
BAHUT GARV HAI BETA

scenes.supernova_script:
Character C says: She actually learned! [She actually learned!]
Character B says: Par itni jaldi bolna kaise seekha? [But how did you learn to speak so fast?]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Validates the protagonist's transformation through the eyes of the family.
- The younger relative who previously mocked her is now impressed.
- Sets up the direct product pitch by asking 'how'.
scenes.supernova_on_screen_text:
SHE ACTUALLY LEARNED
but how did you
PAR ITNI JALDI
learn to speak so fast?
BOLNA KAISE SEEKHA?

scenes.supernova_script: Character A says: Honestly, maine Supernova app try kiya. Wahan AI tutor ke saath real-life situations mein bolne ki practice ki, aur mera dar bilkul khatam ho gaya. [Honestly, I tried the Supernova app. I practiced speaking in real-life situations with an AI tutor there, and my fear completely disappeared.]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Breaks the fourth wall to deliver the CTA and product value proposition.
- Highlights Supernova's specific features: AI tutor and real-life situation practice.
- Ends on a confident, empowering note.
scenes.supernova_on_screen_text:
HONESTLY
I TRIED THE
SUPERNOVA APP
PRACTICED SPEAKING
WITH AN AI TUTOR
AND MY FEAR
DISAPPEARED
